findings.title: Conditionally executed assertions
findings.message: test TestAnthropicTargetParsesMessagesAPIUsage wraps all assertions in a conditional without an else branch, so they may never run
findings.why: test TestAnthropicTargetParsesMessagesAPIUsage wraps all assertions in a conditional without an else branch, so they may never run
findings.how_to_fix: Move assertions out of the conditional, or fail the test explicitly in the branch where the assertions are skipped.

findings.title: Goroutines launched from loops
findings.message: goroutine launched inside a loop should be bounded or queued explicitly
findings.why: goroutine launched inside a loop should be bounded or queued explicitly
findings.how_to_fix: Use a worker pool, semaphore, errgroup limit, or explicit queue so loop-driven concurrency stays bounded.

findings.title: Allocation-heavy loop
findings.message: string "payload" accumulates fmt.Sprintf output inside a loop; use strings.Builder or fmt.Fprintf on a builder
findings.why: string "payload" accumulates fmt.Sprintf output inside a loop; use strings.Builder or fmt.Fprintf on a builder
findings.how_to_fix: Use strings.Builder for string accumulation and preallocate slice capacity with make(len 0, cap n) before the loop.

findings.how_to_fix: Use strings.Builder for string accumulation and preallocate slice capacity with make(len 0, cap n) before the loop.

findings.title: Go taint flow
findings.message: tainted data from os.Getenv (line 201) reaches os.WriteFile (line 84) via os.Getenv -> strings.TrimSpace -> dir -> baseDir() -> err -> profilePath() -> path -> os.WriteFile
findings.why: tainted data from os.Getenv (line 201) reaches os.WriteFile (line 84) via os.Getenv -> strings.TrimSpace -> dir -> baseDir() -> err -> profilePath() -> path -> os.WriteFile
findings.how_to_fix: Validate or sanitize the value before the sink: use parameterized queries, strconv parsing, allow-lists for commands and paths, or static templates.
